prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, construct a potent protein binder targeting ERBB3 (Kinase) expressed by Homo sapiens. The binder should achieve nanomolar affinity. detail a workflow for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using AlphaFold2, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Please include key design considerations and expected challenges.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: ERBB3; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
